name: Social Mention
description: Social media aggregator Tool: http://socialmention.com/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #879 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Social Mention output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target

parameters.name: file
